raw:
BORK - Plan addendum

- I said we need to use stripe, but I meant plaid.

- Stripe is also a good idea though. Id like to be able to send and recieve money via stripe in app too.
optimized:
### OPT-001: Replace Stripe with Plaid for prior integration
Correct prior plan: the previously specified Stripe integration was a misstatement. Replace Stripe with Plaid for that original use case. Update PLAN.md and any related design docs to reference Plaid instead of Stripe wherever the earlier requirement appears.

Source: "I said we need to use stripe, but I meant plaid."

### OPT-002: Add Stripe integration for in-app money transfer
Add Stripe integration to support sending and receiving money within the app. Scope covers in-app payment flows (user-to-user or user-to-service transfers) using Stripe as the payment processor. This is additive and does not conflict with OPT-001 — Stripe here is a new, separate capability, not a replacement for Plaid.

Source: "Stripe is also a good idea though. Id like to be able to send and recieve money via stripe in app too."
